issues.title: Unrelated loop-script feature added in task change
issues.detail: The task is limited to strengthening the user registration API and adding/updating pytest coverage, but this patch adds a large new log-context/app-log feature to the review loop script, including new flags, file rotation, prompt wiring, and staging behavior. That is unrelated to /register validation, violates the requirement to keep changes localized, and significantly increases the review and regression surface for this task.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the copilot-review-loop.zsh changes from this task and submit only the registration API/test edits needed for /register validation.

issues.title: Documentation updated for unrelated CLI options
issues.detail: The README additions document the new log-context CLI behavior, which is unrelated to the registration-validation task. Keeping unrelated documentation changes in the same submission conflicts with the task requirement to avoid unrelated file changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Revert the README additions here, or land them separately with the loop-script feature they document.
